segments.text: Hi, I'm Nicolas Peru.

I'm the Senior VP of Code Quality
at Sonar.

Which means I'm responsible for
everything related to code quality
that we do at SonarSource.

Today I'm going to talk about
automated code review for agents.
And how we at Sonar are building trust

to help you verify AI-generated code
at scale.
Let's start with a quick look

at what the industry has been
going through
in the last couple of years.
The pace at which we generate code
has changed dramatically.
We moved from humans producing code
to GenAI producing code.

This shifted the bottleneck
in the software development lifecycle.

Before, the bottleneck
was producing code.

Developers had to carefully craft
their programs.
Now the bottleneck is reviewing code.

We have many pull requests
that need review.
Many changes that must be validated
before they reach production.
We need to ensure good quality.
No bugs.
No architectural debt.

fullText:
Hi, I'm Nicolas Peru. I'm the Senior VP of Code Quality
at Sonar. Which means I'm responsible for
everything related to code quality that we do at SonarSource. Today I'm going to talk about
automated code review for agents. And how we at Sonar are building trust to help you verify AI-generated code
at scale. Let's start with a quick look at what the industry has been
going through in the last couple of years. The pace at which we generate code has changed dramatically. We moved from humans producing code to GenAI producing code. This shifted the bottleneck
in the software development lifecycle. Before, the bottleneck
was producing code. Developers had to carefully craft
their programs. Now the bottleneck is reviewing code. We have many pull requests
that need review. Many changes that must be validated before they reach production. We need to ensure good quality. No bugs. No architectural debt.
